mediaconnect.gateway.gatewaynetwork.CfnA: The network settings for a gateway.

mediaconnect.gateway.gatewaynetwork.Cidr.Description: A unique IP address range to use for this network. These IP addresses should be in the form of a Classless Inter-Domain Routing (CIDR) block; for example, 10.0.0.0/16.

mediaconnect.gateway.gatewaynetwork.Name.Description: The name of the network. This name is used to reference the network and must be unique among networks in this gateway.
